title: HoloInventory Reloaded
description: HoloInventory Reloaded - A Minecraft mod for holographic inventory display.
body:
This mod is a high-version remaster of HoloInventory. When you point your cursor at a container (such as chests and hoppers), it will display the items inside the container above it.
![3D Display Mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bdcb4820dc69dad294d50c215edf7b19a538b26.png)
![2D Display Mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac37b20d0c21c6c07cfd7e010139a5986178b072.png)

![Config Interface, requires Cloth Config API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a3e307ebfa76baaa25fca4da933bff2b0d04b73.png)
I used the glasses model from the Glasses mod created by Nova-Committee Team. In accordance with this mod's license agreement, the mod itself has been open-sourced under the AGPL-3.0 license.
![Glasses Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b5e88d3f5ad9d6ceac54aceeff20ae6cccb66e0_0.webp)
